seed_rule: Seed from ScratchBird local security tree with raw secrets redacted
visibility_rule: Apply MariaDB privilege visibility for current session
mutation_rule: Security DDL mutates ScratchBird security policy through parser
uuid_mapping_rule: Reference user/host identity aliases principal UUID and external identity UUID
notes: Raw authentication hashes must never be seed authority.

mutation_rule: Read-only compatibility view unless reference DDL maps to security policy
notes: Must preserve legacy mysql.user column shape where profile requires it.

uuid_mapping_rule: Database and principal IDs are reference aliases over UUIDs
notes: Grant deny revoke must map to ScratchBird additive/role policy exactly.
External groups require internal UUID cache.

seed_rule: Seed configured MariaDB compatibility plugins only
mutation_rule: Plugin install/uninstall maps to ScratchBird C++ UDR package policy or is rejected
uuid_mapping_rule: Plugin aliases map to package UUIDs

seed_rule: Computed from stored routines and reference source text
mutation_rule: Reference DDL mutates ScratchBird routine catalog
uuid_mapping_rule: Routine aliases map to routine UUIDs

mutation_rule: Reference event DDL maps to ScratchBird scheduler if supported
uuid_mapping_rule: Event aliases map to job UUIDs

seed_rule: Computed from UUID-backed catalog security metrics and session state
uuid_mapping_rule: Reference IDs are aliases over ScratchBird UUIDs
notes: Must use resolver/comment model and hide UUIDs.

mutation_rule: Read-only report surface; native v3 manages instrumentation
uuid_mapping_rule: Runtime aliases are not catalog authority
notes: Only local node metrics unless cluster schema exists.

seed_rule: Computed convenience views over supported metadata and metrics
mutation_rule: Read-only unless helper routine explicitly mapped
notes: Exact view definitions and default data pending.

backing_authority: sys.metrics plus plugin C++ UDR state
seed_rule: Computed only when plugin profile is enabled
visibility_rule: Apply plugin-specific visibility and ScratchBird policy
mutation_rule: Read-only report surface unless explicitly mapped
notes: Includes metadata_lock_info query_response_time wsrep_info disks and userstat profiles.
